arts.ttl: Alistair Johnston's Celtic 'dark arts' have put 'target' on his back as red card let off sparks ominous ex ref warning
arts.sum: The Canadian international gave away a penalty in the win over Ross County

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton puts journalist straight discussing Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers and West Ham
arts.sum: So when Chris Sutton was asked why Rodgers was not linked to the vacant West Ham job, the Celtic hero wasted no time in shutting that rumour down. Chris Sutton shuts down talk about Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers and West Ham

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton says Brendan Rodgers signing who 'exceeded expectation' is now 'suffering' at Celtic
arts.sum: Sutton also thinks that, last season, during Idah’s six-month loan spell from Norwich City, he ‘exceeded expectation’, as he told Sky Sports Football (11/01/25 at 12:15 pm). Chris Sutton says Adam Idah is ‘suffering’ at Celtic

arts.ttl: The player who could have joined Celtic or Rangers before SPFL move
arts.sum: The player who could have joined Celtic or Rangers before SPFL move.

arts.ttl: Embarrassing admin mistake means Celtic transfer back on – Player can leave in coming days
arts.sum: On Monday, Estadio Deportivo reported Luis Palma is very close to joining Rayo Vallecano after they found an agreement with Brendan Rodgers’ side for a loan deal in the winter market. Later that day, Diez in Honduras reported the winger’s move to Spain won’t go through as FIFA have banned Rayo Vallecano from registering players The post Embarrassing admin mistake means Celtic transfer back on – Player can leave in coming days appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: 6 rocketing Celtic transfer headlines on Tierney, Jota, Taylor, Barry and Melia as £40m man Chukwuemeka fits the bill
arts.sum: Business looks set to boom at Celtic Park in January and beyond

arts.ttl: Podcast: Dundee v Celtic preview & transfer latest
arts.sum: We discuss Dundee v Celtic, the latest transfer news and the disquiet at Rangers.

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd is rattled crying about a Ross County vs Celtic VAR decision ‘nobody will want to speak about'
arts.sum: And now, three days on, Boyd continues to cry about an apparent red card decision in Celtic’s win at Ross County and claims no one wants to speak about it. “I know my big friend [Chris Sutton], he wasn’t for taking me on there but I think obviously denying a goal-scoring opportunity and no attempt to play the ball, that was interesting shall we say.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers told to approach Celtic CEO Michael Nicholson to make SPFL rule change
arts.sum: His first port of call should be going up the stairs, speaking to Michael Nicholson, it’s the clubs that voted to end the winter break. However, Andy Walker has told Rodgers that if he wants to bring back the winter break, then he advised him to ‘go upstairs’ and speak to the club’s CEO, Michael Nicholson.

arts.ttl: Carter Vickers insists his Celtic transfer inbox is empty and he's not looking to see what might land
arts.sum: The defender has been linked with a bid from German big guns Bayer Leverkusen and beyond
